name: pv-guidelines
description: Pharmacovigilance Guidelines Index - ICH, CIOMS, and EMA GVP

cioms.name: Council for International Organizations of Medical Sciences

quality.title: Stability Testing for Drug Substances and Drug Products
quality.description: Consolidated revision superseding ICH Q1A-F and Q5C. Covers stability testing principles.

quality.title: Validation of Analytical Procedures
quality.description: Guidance on selection and evaluation of validation tests for analytical procedures.

quality.title: Impurities: Guideline for Residual Solvents
quality.description: Recommendations on use of less toxic solvents and pharmaceutical limits for residual solvents.

quality.title: Elemental Impurities
quality.description: Control of elemental impurities in drug products. Establishes Permitted Daily Exposures (PDEs).

quality.title: Comparability of Biotechnological/Biological Products
quality.description: Quality issues when manufacturing process changes affect biotechnological products.

quality.title: Specifications: Test Procedures and Acceptance Criteria for New Drug Substances
quality.description: Guidance on setting specifications for new drug substances and products (chemical entities).

quality.title: Specifications: Biotechnological/Biological Products
quality.description: Test procedures and acceptance criteria for biotechnological/biological products.

quality.title: Good Manufacturing Practice for Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients
quality.description: GMP guidance for manufacturing APIs by chemical synthesis, extraction, fermentation, etc.

quality.title: Pharmaceutical Development
quality.description: Guidance on contents of Module 3.2.P.2 (Pharmaceutical Development) of the CTD.

quality.title: Quality Risk Management
quality.description: Systematic approach to quality risk management throughout the product lifecycle.

quality.title: Pharmaceutical Quality System
quality.description: Model for effective pharmaceutical quality system based on ISO and GMP concepts.

quality.title: Development and Manufacture of Drug Substances
quality.description: Guidance on development and manufacture of drug substances (chemical and biotechnological).

quality.title: Technical and Regulatory Considerations for Pharmaceutical Product Lifecycle Management
quality.description: Framework for managing post-approval CMC changes with regulatory flexibility.

quality.title: Continuous Manufacturing of Drug Substances and Drug Products
quality.description: Scientific and regulatory considerations for continuous manufacturing.

quality.title: Analytical Procedure Development
quality.description: Enhanced approach to analytical procedure development using QbD principles.

safety.title: Need for Carcinogenicity Studies of Pharmaceuticals
safety.description: Guidance on when carcinogenicity studies are needed for pharmaceuticals.

safety.title: Testing for Carcinogenicity of Pharmaceuticals
safety.description: Recommendations for testing pharmaceuticals for carcinogenic potential.

safety.title: Dose Selection for Carcinogenicity Studies of Pharmaceuticals
safety.description: Principles for selection of high dose in carcinogenicity studies.

safety.title: Genotoxicity Testing and Data Interpretation
safety.description: Guidance on genotoxicity testing and data interpretation for human pharmaceuticals.

safety.title: Toxicokinetics: Assessment of Systemic Exposure in Toxicity Studies
safety.description: Assessment of systemic exposure in toxicity studies.

safety.title: Detection of Reproductive and Developmental Toxicity
safety.description: Detection of toxicity to reproduction for human pharmaceuticals.

safety.title: Preclinical Safety Evaluation of Biotechnology-Derived Pharmaceuticals
safety.description: Preclinical safety evaluation of biotechnology-derived pharmaceuticals.

safety.title: Safety Pharmacology Studies for Human Pharmaceuticals
safety.description: Core battery of safety pharmacology studies.

safety.title: Nonclinical Evaluation of QT Interval Prolongation
safety.description: Nonclinical evaluation of potential for delayed ventricular repolarization.

safety.title: Immunotoxicity Studies for Human Pharmaceuticals
safety.description: Nonclinical testing approaches to evaluate immunotoxicity.

safety.title: Nonclinical Pediatric Safety
safety.description: Nonclinical safety testing to support pediatric drug development.

safety.title: Nonclinical Biodistribution for Gene Therapy Products
safety.description: Nonclinical biodistribution considerations for gene therapy products.

efficacy.title: Population Exposure for Clinical Safety Assessment
efficacy.description: Extent of population exposure to assess clinical safety for long-term treatment drugs.

efficacy.title: Clinical Safety Data Management: Definitions and Standards
efficacy.description: Definitions and standards for expedited reporting of adverse drug reactions.

efficacy.title: Clinical Safety Data Management: Data Elements for Transmission
efficacy.description: Data elements for electronic transmission of individual case safety reports.

efficacy.title: Periodic Benefit-Risk Evaluation Report (PBRER)
efficacy.description: Format and content of periodic benefit-risk evaluation reports.

efficacy.title: Post-Approval Safety Data Management
efficacy.description: Definitions and standards for post-approval safety data management.

efficacy.title: Development Safety Update Report (DSUR)
efficacy.description: Format and content of development safety update reports during clinical development.

efficacy.title: Structure and Content of Clinical Study Reports
efficacy.description: Structure and content of clinical study reports for regulatory submission.

efficacy.title: Good Clinical Practice (GCP)
efficacy.description: International ethical and scientific quality standard for clinical trials.

efficacy.title: Good Clinical Practice (R3)
efficacy.description: Updated GCP guideline with focus on quality, proportionality, and technology.

efficacy.title: General Considerations for Clinical Studies
efficacy.description: General considerations and framework for designing clinical studies.

efficacy.title: Statistical Principles for Clinical Trials (R1)
efficacy.description: Statistical principles for clinical trial design, conduct, and analysis.

efficacy.title: Clinical and Nonclinical Evaluation of QT/QTc Prolongation
efficacy.description: Questions and answers on clinical and nonclinical QT evaluation.

efficacy.title: General Principles for Planning Multi-Regional Clinical Trials
efficacy.description: Planning and design of multi-regional clinical trials.

efficacy.title: Optimization of Safety Data Collection
efficacy.description: Selective approach to safety data collection in clinical trials.

efficacy.title: Adaptive Clinical Trials
efficacy.description: Principles for design and analysis of adaptive clinical trials.

multidisciplinary.title: MedDRA Terminology
multidisciplinary.description: Medical Dictionary for Regulatory Activities - standardized medical terminology.

multidisciplinary.title: Nonclinical Safety Studies for Pharmaceuticals in Clinical Trials
multidisciplinary.description: Guidance on timing and conduct of nonclinical safety studies.

multidisciplinary.title: Common Technical Document (CTD)
multidisciplinary.description: Organization of CTD for registration of pharmaceuticals.

multidisciplinary.title: Mutagenic Impurities
multidisciplinary.description: Assessment and control of DNA reactive (mutagenic) impurities.

multidisciplinary.title: Bioanalytical Method Validation
multidisciplinary.description: Validation and implementation of bioanalytical methods.

multidisciplinary.title: Clinical Electronic Structured Harmonised Protocol (CeSHarP)
multidisciplinary.description: Electronic structured clinical study protocol template.

multidisciplinary.title: Bioequivalence for Immediate-Release Solid Oral Dosage Forms
multidisciplinary.description: Guidance on bioequivalence studies for IR solid oral dosage forms.

pharmacovigilance.title: Artificial Intelligence in Pharmacovigilance
pharmacovigilance.description: CIOMS Working Group report on AI applications in drug safety.

pharmacovigilance.title: CIOMS Cumulative Glossary with Focus on Pharmacovigilance (Version 2.3)
pharmacovigilance.description: Terms and definitions from CIOMS Working Group reports.

pharmacovigilance.title: Introduction to MedDRA Labeling Grouping (MLG)
pharmacovigilance.description: Guidance on using MedDRA for product labeling.

pharmacovigilance.title: Severe Cutaneous Adverse Reactions (SCAR)
pharmacovigilance.description: Guidance on management of severe cutaneous adverse reactions.

pharmacovigilance.title: Real-World Data and Real-World Evidence in Regulatory Decision Making
pharmacovigilance.description: Use of RWD/RWE in regulatory and safety decisions.

pharmacovigilance.title: Practical Aspects of Signal Detection in Pharmacovigilance
pharmacovigilance.description: CIOMS Working Group VIII report on signal detection methods.

pharmacovigilance.title: Management of Safety Information from Clinical Trials
pharmacovigilance.description: CIOMS Working Group VI on clinical trial safety data.

pharmacovigilance.title: Current Challenges in Pharmacovigilance
pharmacovigilance.description: CIOMS/WHO Working Group V on pharmacovigilance challenges.

pharmacovigilance.title: Benefit-Risk Balance for Marketed Drugs
pharmacovigilance.description: CIOMS Working Group IV on evaluating benefit-risk.

pharmacovigilance.title: International Reporting of Adverse Drug Reactions (CIOMS I Form)
pharmacovigilance.description: CIOMS form for international ADR reporting.

ethics.title: International Ethical Guidelines for Health-Related Research Involving Humans
ethics.description: Ethical guidelines for health research involving human participants.

ethics.title: International Guidelines on Good Governance Practice for Research Institutions

gvp_modules.title: Pharmacovigilance Systems and Their Quality Systems
gvp_modules.description: EU requirements for pharmacovigilance systems, QPPV responsibilities, and quality management.

gvp_modules.title: Pharmacovigilance System Master File (Rev. 2)
gvp_modules.description: Requirements for the PSMF including content, format, and maintenance.

gvp_modules.title: Pharmacovigilance Inspections
gvp_modules.description: Procedures for PV inspections by competent authorities in the EU.

gvp_modules.title: Pharmacovigilance Audits (Rev. 1)
gvp_modules.description: Guidance on conducting and documenting pharmacovigilance audits.

gvp_modules.title: Risk Management Systems (Rev. 2)
gvp_modules.description: EU requirements for risk management plans (RMPs) and risk minimization measures.

gvp_modules.title: Collection, Management and Submission of Adverse Reaction Reports (Rev. 2)
gvp_modules.description: EU requirements for ICSR collection, processing, and submission to EudraVigilance.

gvp_modules.title: Periodic Safety Update Report
gvp_modules.description: EU requirements for PSUR format, content, and submission procedures.

gvp_modules.title: Post-Authorisation Safety Studies (Rev. 3)
gvp_modules.description: EU requirements for PASS design, conduct, and reporting.

gvp_modules.title: Signal Management (Rev. 1)
gvp_modules.description: EU signal detection, validation, and assessment procedures.

gvp_modules.title: Additional Monitoring
gvp_modules.description: Black triangle scheme and additional monitoring requirements in the EU.

gvp_modules.title: Safety Communication (Rev. 1)
gvp_modules.description: Requirements for DHPCs, safety announcements, and communication plans.

gvp_modules.title: Risk Minimisation Measures (Rev. 3)
gvp_modules.description: Selection, implementation, and effectiveness evaluation of risk minimization measures.

gvp_addenda.title: Duplicate Management of Suspected Adverse Reaction Reports
gvp_addenda.description: Guidance on identifying and managing duplicate ICSRs.

gvp_addenda.title: Masking of Personal Data in Individual Case Safety Reports
gvp_addenda.description: Requirements for anonymization and data protection in ICSRs.

gvp_addenda.title: Non-Interventional Post-Authorisation Safety Studies (Rev. 3)
gvp_addenda.description: Detailed guidance on NI-PASS protocols, conduct, and reporting.

gvp_addenda.title: Signal Detection Methodological Aspects
gvp_addenda.description: Statistical methods and data mining approaches for signal detection.

gvp_addenda.title: Embryo-Fetal Risk Minimisation
gvp_addenda.description: Specific guidance on pregnancy prevention programmes and teratogenic risk.

gvp_addenda.title: Evaluating Risk Minimisation Effectiveness
gvp_addenda.description: Methods for measuring effectiveness of risk minimization measures.

gvp_product_specific.title: Vaccines for Prophylaxis Against Infectious Diseases
gvp_product_specific.description: PV considerations specific to prophylactic vaccines.

gvp_product_specific.title: Biological Medicinal Products
gvp_product_specific.description: PV considerations for biologics including traceability and immunogenicity.

gvp_product_specific.title: Paediatric Population
gvp_product_specific.description: PV considerations for medicines used in children.

gvp_annexes.title: Definitions (Rev. 5)
gvp_annexes.description: Standardized definitions used across all GVP modules.

gvp_annexes.title: Templates
gvp_annexes.description: Standard templates for PSUR cover page, DHPC, and communication plans.

gvp_annexes.title: Abbreviations (Rev. 1)
gvp_annexes.description: Standard abbreviations used in EU pharmacovigilance.
